# CWE-262 — Not Using Password Aging (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-262-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

type credRow struct {
	User      string    `db:"user"`
	Hash      string    `db:"hash"`
	ChangedAt time.Time `db:"changed_at"`
}

const maxPasswordAge = 90 * 24 * time.Hour

// Safe: rejects credentials older than the configured rotation window.
func LoginWithAging(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	user := c.PostForm("user")
	var row credRow
	if err := db.Get(&row, "SELECT user, hash, changed_at FROM creds WHERE user = ?", user); err != nil {
		c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "auth"})
		return
	}
	if time.Since(row.ChangedAt) > maxPasswordAge {
		c.JSON(403, gin.H{"error": "password_expired"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"session": user})
}
